name: Delete User Account (Soft Delete) Performance Test — PATCH /api/v1/users/{user_id}
description: Validate soft-deactivation of user accounts via PATCH /api/v1/users/{user_id} under concurrent load, ensuring max response time and success rate targets are met, and verifying data integrity (deactivated users do not appear in /users/active).
corresponding NFR: Delete User Account (Write/Delete Operation) — PATCH /api/v1/users/{user_id} (soft delete by status update) must achieve Max Response Time ≤ 500 ms, Success Rate ≥ 98%, simulate 50 concurrent deactivations, and deactivated users must not appear in /users/active (Data Integrity).
preconditions: Test users must exist and be in "active" status.
Users should not have pending transactions that prevent deletion.

input data.data_integrity_check: After each PATCH, verify the deactivated user does not appear in /users/active.

metrics.target: Deactivated users must not appear in /users/active

notes: Defaults applied where required to define the load profile: duration_s=180 and think_time_s=[1,2]. Use a pool of pre-created active users and ensure each user_id is deactivated at most once per run to avoid repeat-operation failures. Data Integrity is validated by confirming deactivated users are absent from /users/active after the PATCH completes.
